languages.text: От этой мерзости исходит ощутимый жар; воздух подле оскаленной пасти раскален до предела.
This foul creation radiates palpable heat. The air near the leering mouth is searingly hot.
languages.original_text: От этой мерзости исходит ощутимый жар; воздух подле оскаленной пасти раскален до предела.

traits.locale_text: This foul creation radiates palpable heat. The air near the leering mouth is searingly hot.
This foul creation radiates palpable heat. The air near the leering mouth is searingly hot.
This foul creation radiates palpable heat. The air near the leering mouth is searingly hot.

languages.text: 这件污秽造物散发着灼热高温。那张狰狞残口附近的空气已被炽烤得灼热难耐。
languages.original_text: This foul creation radiates palpable heat. The air near the leering mouth is searingly hot.

traits.locale_text: 这件污秽造物散发着灼热高温。那张狰狞残口附近的空气已被炽烤得灼热难耐。

languages.text: Esta inmunda creación desprende un calor palpable. El aire en torno a la boca es abrasador.
languages.original_text: This foul creation radiates palpable heat. The air near the leering mouth is searingly hot.

traits.locale_text: Esta inmunda creación desprende un calor palpable. El aire en torno a la boca es abrasador.

languages.text: La machine répugnante émet une chaleur palpable. Près de sa gueule exhalant une haleine fétide, l'air devient étouffant.
languages.original_text: This foul creation radiates palpable heat. The air near the leering mouth is searingly hot.

traits.locale_text: La machine répugnante émet une chaleur palpable. Près de sa gueule exhalant une haleine fétide, l'air devient étouffant.

languages.text: Bu iğrenç yaratım, somut bir ısı yayıyor. Pis pis sırıtan ağzının etrafındaki hava, yakıcı derecede sıcak.
languages.original_text: This foul creation radiates palpable heat. The air near the leering mouth is searingly hot.

traits.locale_text: Bu iğrenç yaratım, somut bir ısı yayıyor. Pis pis sırıtan ağzının etrafındaki hava, yakıcı derecede sıcak.

languages.text: Von der unheilvollen Kreation geht eine spürbare Hitze aus. Die Luft um den anzüglich grinsenden Mund ist sengend heiß.
languages.original_text: This foul creation radiates palpable heat. The air near the leering mouth is searingly hot.

traits.locale_text: Von der unheilvollen Kreation geht eine spürbare Hitze aus. Die Luft um den anzüglich grinsenden Mund ist sengend heiß.

languages.text: この汚い生き物は、手に触れるような熱を放っている。邪悪な口の近くでは、空気は灼熱の暑さだ。
languages.original_text: This foul creation radiates palpable heat. The air near the leering mouth is searingly hot.

traits.locale_text: この汚い生き物は、手に触れるような熱を放っている。邪悪な口の近くでは、空気は灼熱の暑さだ。
